behavior_summary: U8P_KORGFANG::look is an examine/inspect handler for the object KORGFANG. When triggered it displays a single line of player-facing text: "Korghin's Fang".
After showing the text the process suspends/waits for player acknowledgement (the engine's suspend/await behavior), effectively pausing the U8P_KORGFANG::look interaction until dismissed.
The routine contains no branching, menus, flag reads/writes, or external API calls; it does not modify game state.
The file also contains item metadata describing weapon stats (e.g., baseDamage 7, magic/blade, attackDexBonus 4, armourBonus 1), but that metadata is not referenced by the U8P_KORGFANG::look process.
notable_control_flow: U8P_KORGFANG::look: emit bark/dialogue line "Korghin's Fang" -> suspend/wait. No conditional branches or subsequent actions.
Entry is event-driven (U8P_KORGFANG::look/examine); flow is linear and ends by pausing the process until player dismisses the text.
open_questions: Is U8P_KORGFANG::look invoked by an explicit player 'U8P_KORGFANG::look' menu option, by entering a fast-area trigger, or both? (inferred but not explicit)
Are the item metadata fields used elsewhere (inventory/equipment, combat) even though U8P_KORGFANG::look does not reference them?

main_function.name: U8P_KORGFANG::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the KORGFANG object; display the item's name and suspend until dismissal.
entry_conditions: Player performs an examine/'U8P_KORGFANG::look' action on the KORGFANG object.
Engine invokes the object's U8P_KORGFANG::look/inspect process (process type 0x0208), which may be triggered by menu selection or entering the object's fast-area.

function_map.name: U8P_KORGFANG::look
function_map.role: examine/inspect handler that displays the item's short name and suspends

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_KORGFANG::look is an examine/inspect handler for the object KORGFANG. When triggered it displays a single line of player-facing text: "Korghin's Fang".
